action_set_definitions.name: get_system_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current system time (ISO 8601) and the metadata of the processing officer currently logged in.

action_set_definitions.name: get_application_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of application IDs currently awaiting review in the processing queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full technical and administrative details of a specific permit application.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the permit application.

action_set_definitions.name: get_regulatory_standards
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves statutory limit tables, including Maximum Allowable Quantity (MAQ) tables and NFPA 55 safety requirements.

standard_category.description: The specific regulatory category to retrieve.

data.Pyrophoric_Exterior_Requirement: Must be within 5ft of exterior wall

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_application_review
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the application with a final regulatory status, documents specific code violations, and closes the review process.

violations.description: A list of specific code sections or safety violations identified.

case_notes.description: Detailed justification for the status, including technical evaluation results.

state_description.applications: A dictionary mapping application_ids to their detailed records (applicant, type, status, submission_date).
state_description.processing_queue: A list of application_ids currently awaiting review, ordered by priority.
state_description.officer_metadata: Information about the current logged-in processing officer and their permissions.
state_description.system_clock: The current simulated ISO 8601 timestamp of the environment.
